roots.reason: Root is declared by the adapter but does not exist, so scans skip it.

config.reason: Hermes config mutation and rollback-safe skill toggle targets are unverified; diagnostics do not read Hermes secrets or cron content.

access.writable_reason: Hermes writable toggle/install remains blocked until individual skill disable schema and rollback-safe writes are verified.
access.install_reason: Hermes install semantics are not confirmed.
access.read_only_reason: Hermes writable toggle/install remains blocked until individual skill disable schema and rollback-safe writes are verified.

last_scan.reason: No scan activity is persisted in adapter diagnostics; catalog.scanAll returns per-agent activity for the current refresh.

blockers: Hermes external_dirs are scan-only external roots, not writable or install targets.
